samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="adder_pipe_64bit">
    <description>64-bit Ripple Carry Adder with Pipeline Stages</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="i_en">Enable signal for addition operation.</input>
        <input id="adda" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="addb" width_description="[63:0]">64-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[64:0]">65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb.</output>
        <output id="o_en">Output enable signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state name="IDLE" value="2'b00"/>
        <state name="STAGE1" value="2'b01"/>
        <state name="STAGE2" value="2'b10"/>
        <state name="DONE" value="2'b11"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="reg_i_en" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_adda" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_addb" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE1"/>
        <register id="reg_sum_stage1" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE2"/>
        <register id="reg_carry_stage1" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="STAGE2"/>
        <register id="reg_sum_stage2" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="DONE"/>
        <register id="reg_carry_stage2" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="DONE"/>
        <register id="reg_result" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="DONE"/>
        <register id="reg_o_en" init_value="0" control_signals="clk, rst_n" update_condition="reg_i_en" next_state="DONE"/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Stage 1: Calculate partial sums and carries
        reg_sum_stage1 <= reg_adda + reg_addb;
        reg_carry_stage1 <= (reg_adda & reg_addb) | (reg_adda & {64{reg_sum_stage1[63]}});
        
        // Stage 2: Calculate final sum and carry
        reg_sum_stage2 <= reg_sum_stage1 + reg_carry_stage1;
        reg_carry_stage2 <= (reg_sum_stage1 & reg_carry_stage1) | (reg_sum_stage1 & {64{reg_sum_stage2[63]}});
        
        // Final result calculation
        reg_result <= reg_sum_stage2 + reg_carry_stage2;
        
        // Output enable signal
        reg_o_en <= reg_i_en;
    </implementation>
</module>
```
